style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Top: SERVER box issues a CSRF token along two arrows: one labelled httpOnly csrf_token COOKIE going to a BROWSER box, one labelled TOKEN IN JSON BODY going to a CLIENT (IN MEMORY) box. Bottom: on a WRITE REQUEST the client sends X-CSRF-TOKEN HEADER plus the COOKIE into a diamond labelled CONSTANT-TIME COMPARE, with two outputs MATCH then ALLOW, and MISMATCH then 403. A small caption reads DOUBLE-SUBMIT, SAFE BY DEFAULT. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Top: SERVER box issues a CSRF token along two arrows: one labelled httpOnly csrf_token COOKIE going to a BROWSER box, one labelled TOKEN IN JSON BODY going to a CLIENT (IN MEMORY) box. Bottom: on a WRITE REQUEST the client sends X-CSRF-TOKEN HEADER plus the COOKIE into a diamond labelled CONSTANT-TIME COMPARE, with two outputs MATCH then ALLOW, and MISMATCH then 403. A small caption reads DOUBLE-SUBMIT, SAFE BY DEFAULT. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
